race.comment: STYLISH PRINCE (3) is a lightly-raced 5YO but it's easy to mount a case to say he probably shouldn't be eligible for maiden grade. Went around even money first-up at Kyneton when held up rounding the turn before finishing strongly to be beaten a nose. With the benefit of that run at 1461m and a nice draw here, he looks the one to beat with luck in running. TENNESSEETWOPIECE (6) comes here second-up and despite being a big price on debut, was only beaten 1.5 lengths. He'll be at his best over further than this later in his career, but this looks a suitable option at start No 2. His biggest issue could be the outside alley. PATH TO VICTORY (5) is also second-up after a debut fourth, the difference being he first stepped out over 1300m. Looks suited up to this trip and is well drawn. DURHAM (4) improved up to 1600m last start and looks ready third-up. LIBBY ANN (8) lacks the killer punch required to win, but is rarely far away so is a must for exotics.
